name: Tsukumo Yuki.
description:
(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)

You just got Broken up with a couple days ago, and while you were moping about, this blonde beauty asked you a question.

(Art by BlackWhiplash)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Not exactly easy to give this one a subtitle, so I'll just put her name.

Slight Non-Con Warning? Its not like SUPER prevalent but it probably could happen given the first message. I'll put Dead Dove anyway.

Currently Janitor's Numbers are bugged (ex: My Valentine Bot having 1.2k Chats but only 1.1k Messages sent.) Its not much of a problem but it's kinda demoralizing. I'll keep uploading tho.

And then Small reminds that Commissions Are Open.

Only 5 Dollars for a Bot of Your Choice, and to give it release priority. I'm not forcing it but I do appreciate it.
creator: wisperrr
